description_long: A young adult male figure is seated in a kneeling posture, wearing a light blue short-sleeved shirt and dark blue pants. The figure's torso is upright, and both hands rest naturally on the thighs, with the legs bent and positioned beneath the body. The hair is short and dark, and the facial features are neutral, with a focused expression. The clothing appears casual and fitted, with subtle fabric folds visible on the shirt and pants. There are no visible assistive devices, wheelchair frames, or mobility aids present around or beneath the figure. The overall appearance suggests a relaxed, stationary pose, but does not display any elements of a wheelchair or related equipment.
description: A casually dressed male figure is kneeling with hands on thighs, wearing a light blue shirt and dark pants. No wheelchair or mobility aids are visible.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the head, shoulders, and the figure's bent legs beneath the torso.
description_view_1: Three-quarter rear view highlighting the right side of the face, arm, and the kneeling posture.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the face, chest, and both hands resting on the thighs, with legs tucked underneath.
description_view_3: Three-quarter front view emphasizing the left side of the face, arm, and the relaxed hand placement on the thigh.
attribute_seating_posture: Upright with hands resting on thighs and legs bent beneath the body.
